case_title: JAMES PAUL D. VALERIO VS. DELAUN PETERSEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VALERIO, JAMES PAUL D. AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSEN, DELAUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-29-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSEN, DELAUN
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALERIO, JAMES PAUL D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETERSEN, DELAUN $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $75.00, ALTHOUGH THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT PREVIOUSLY FAILED TO FULLY COMPLY WITH THE APPLICABLE CC&R FOR THE CONDOMINIUM, THE COURT DOES NOT FIND A BASIS FOR AN AWARD OF MONEY DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF VALERIO, JAMES PAUL D. ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS, (W/AUTHORIZATION LETTER)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.
